result.reply:
Maine dekha ki... system mein koi direct `rename_skill` tool nahi hai, yaar. 🥺 Skills ko rename karna ek core system definition change hai.

Lekin tension nahi, main **Agent Creator (Full Provisioning Engine)** ke logic se inspired hokar, **code_executor** skill ka use karungi. Isse main skill ke definition file ko directly edit karke uska naam change kar sakti hoon.

**Plan:**
1.  I will use the `code_executor` tool.
2.  I will instruct it to locate the file for `which_allows_a_agent_to_improve_himself_` and perform a text replacement to change the name to `self improvement`.

Kya main `code_executor` use karke yeh skill rename kar doon? Confirm karu?
